flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cedarville University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.4k → $37.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cedarville University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.4k → $37.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cedarville University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cedarville University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6k → 4.0k).
